articles.description: Portland Trail Blazers (38-38, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Los Angeles Clippers (39-36, eighth in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Clippers face the Trail Blazers on 5-game win streak

articles.description: Charlotte Hornets (39-36, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Brooklyn Nets (18-57, 13th in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Charlotte takes on Brooklyn for conference showdown

articles.description: Philadelphia 76ers (41-33, seventh in the Eastern Conference) vs. Miami Heat (39-36, ninth in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Miami plays Philadelphia on home slide

articles.description: Detroit Pistons (54-20, first in the Eastern Conference) vs. Oklahoma City Thunder (59-16, first in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Oklahoma City looks for 60th win this season in matchup with Detroit

articles.description: Boston Celtics (50-24, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Atlanta Hawks (42-33, sixth in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Celtics play the Hawks, look for 4th straight win

articles.description: New York Knicks (48-27, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Houston Rockets (45-29, sixth in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Houston plays New York in non-conference matchup

videos.description: Luka Doncic drops 43 points, 13 assists and 9 rebounds to help the Lakers clinch a spot in the knockout stages of the NBA Cup.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka's 43-point night helps Lakers clinch Group B) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Luka's 43-point night helps Lakers clinch Group B

videos.description: Luka Doncic is hot early as he drains back-to-back 3-pointers for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka feeling it after back-to-back treys) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Luka feeling it after back-to-back treys

videos.description: Luka Doncic cooks up another 3-pointer in the first quarter, giving him 17 points in the frame for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka cashes in on his 4th 3-pointer of the 1st quarter) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Luka cashes in on his 4th 3-pointer of the 1st quarter

videos.description: James Harden drives toward the rim and drops in a floater while drawing contact.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Harden floats in and-1 for the Clippers) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Harden floats in and-1 for the Clippers

videos.description: Kobe Brown flies to the rack and posterizes two Lakers defenders for the Clippers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Kobe Brown throws it down over 2 Lakers) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kobe Brown throws it down over 2 Lakers

videos.description: Kobe Brown tries to drop in a layup, but LeBron James rises up for the huge block for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LeBron elevates for a massive block) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: LeBron elevates for a massive block

videos.description: Luka Doncic drives in front of the rim and drops in a fadeaway and-1 for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka fades away for a tough and-1) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Luka fades away for a tough and-1

videos.description: LeBron James gets the ball near the baseline and drops in an and-1 over James Harden.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LeBron draws and-1 on Harden) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: LeBron draws and-1 on Harden

videos.description: Luka Doncic knocks down a step-back 3-pointer to give him 32 points in the first half for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka's 3-pointer gives him 32 points in the 1st half) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Luka's 3-pointer gives him 32 points in the 1st half

videos.description: LeBron James lasers a pass to Rui Hachimura along the baseline for a Lakers dunk.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LeBron finds Rui for a Lakers jam) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: LeBron finds Rui for a Lakers jam

videos.description: Kawhi Leonard drops in a smooth jumper from the corner for the Clippers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Kawhi cashes in on jumper from the corner) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kawhi cashes in on jumper from the corner

videos.description: Luka Doncic passes to a driving LeBron James for a Lakers and-1.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luka finds LeBron for and-1) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Luka finds LeBron for and-1

videos.description: LeBron James pulls up from the corner and drops in a 3-pointer for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (LeBron drops in a corner 3) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: LeBron drops in a corner 3

videos.description: Jaxson Hayes tosses it up to Rui Hachimura for a two-handed jam for the Lakers.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaxson Hayes lobs it to Rui Hachimura for a jam) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaxson Hayes lobs it to Rui Hachimura for a jam

videos.description: Kris Dunn aggressively pushes ball into Luka Doncic's chest, leading to Jaxson Hayes and Dunn getting into it, eventually resulting in an ejection for the Clippers player.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Dunn ejected after scuffling with Doncic, Hayes) 2025/11/26 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dunn ejected after scuffling with Doncic, Hayes
